name: Ferplast Pet Feeding Bwl Sprnova 45
description: Key Features Material: Made of high-quality stainless steel, the bowl ensures durability and ease of cleaning, maintaining great hygiene over long-term use. Raised Rim: A special raised rim design helps prevent insects and other contaminants from entering the bowl, ensuring the food or water remains clean and safe for your pet. Anti-Slip Base: The bowl includes an anti-slip rubber base to keep it firmly in place during feeding, reducing spills and messes. Size and Capacity: The Supernova 45 is one of six available sizes, suitable for both cats and small to medium-sized dogs, with a capacity that fits a typical meal serving. Versatility: Suitable for dry and wet food, water, pasta, rice, biscuits, and more, making it a versatile feeding solution for various diets. Design: Its simple yet refined chrome finish makes it functional while fitting neatly with home decor. Practical Benefits Easy to clean and maintain due to stainless steel construction. Enhanced hygiene by reducing insect contact with food. Stable during use to avoid food spills or accidents. Suitable for multiple pet types, ensuring adaptability in multi-pet households. This bowl is ideal for pet owners looking for a long-lasting, hygienic, and stylish bowl that meets the needs of everyday feeding for their cats or dogs.
